description: Perform a water quality assessment on the 14-day aquarium chemistry data. The analysis must include parameter averages, conditional formatting for dangerous readings, a total violation count, and an identification of the primary water quality problem. Save the results to /home/ga/Documents/aquarium_analysis.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Analyze the aquarium water chemistry log. Calculate average levels for pH, Ammonia, Nitrite, and Nitrate. Apply conditional formatting to highlight readings exceeding safe thresholds (Ammonia >0.25, Nitrite >0.5, Nitrate >40, pH outside 6.5-7.5). Count how many days each parameter exceeded thresholds and identify the primary problem.
